data.narrative:
MBRYONICS is a Series B-stage Space & Aerospace company that has raised €17.5M+ to date. The valuation analysis draws on a comp universe of 5 public tickers (RKLB, PL, LUNR, ASTS, SATL) and 8 private peers including Aalyria, Hubble Network, and Sift.

The peer-median method is the primary applicable approach. Three same-sector, same-stage comparables yield a median valuation of $400M, with observed valuations ranging from $274M (Sift) to $1.3B (Aalyria). Public-comp anchoring via price-to-sales multiples cannot be applied; while the Space & Aerospace sector median P/S across 6 public names is 49.8x, MBRYONICS' revenue is not disclosed, precluding meaningful multiple application.

The triangulated valuation range is $340M (low) to $460M (high), with a central estimate of $400M. This range reflects peer dispersion and the limited methodological input available from disclosed data. Key uncertainties include revenue and margin profiles relative to peers, the representativeness of the three comparable valuations given sector heterogeneity, and the significant valuation spread ($274M–$1.3B) within the peer set itself. Further financial disclosure from the target would support revenue multiple or DCF-based refinement.
